lines.english: What was wrong with the man's story?
lines.chinese: 这个人的话有什么漏洞？
lines.raw: What was wrong with the man's story? | 这个人的话有什么漏洞？

lines.english: 'At the time the murder was committed, I was travelling on the 8 o'clock train to London,' said the man.
lines.chinese: “在谋杀发生的时候，我正坐8点钟的火车去伦敦。”那人说。
lines.raw: 'At the time the murder was committed, I was travelling on the 8 o'clock train to London,' said the man. | “在谋杀发生的时候，我正坐8点钟的火车去伦敦。”那人说。

lines.english: 'Do you always catch such an early train?' asked the inspector.
lines.chinese: “你总是赶这么早的火车吗？”探长问。
lines.raw: 'Do you always catch such an early train?' asked the inspector. | “你总是赶这么早的火车吗？”探长问。

lines.english: 'Of course I do,' answered the man.
lines.raw: 'Of course I do,' answered the man. | “我当然是。”那人回答。

lines.english: 'I must be at work at 10 o'clock.
lines.raw: 'I must be at work at 10 o'clock. | “我10点钟必须上班。

lines.english: My employer will confirm that I was there on time.'
lines.chinese: 我的雇主可以证明我准时到了那里。”
lines.raw: My employer will confirm that I was there on time.' | 我的雇主可以证明我准时到了那里。”

lines.english: 'Would a later train get you to work on time?' asked the inspector.
lines.chinese: “晚一点的火车也能让你准时上班吗？”探长问。
lines.raw: 'Would a later train get you to work on time?' asked the inspector. | “晚一点的火车也能让你准时上班吗？”探长问。

lines.english: 'I suppose it would, but I never catch a later train.'
lines.chinese: “我想是的，但我从不赶晚一点的火车。”
lines.raw: 'I suppose it would, but I never catch a later train.' | “我想是的，但我从不赶晚一点的火车。”

lines.english: 'At what time did you arrive at the station?'
lines.raw: 'At what time did you arrive at the station?' | “你什么时候到车站的？”

lines.english: 'At ten to eight. I bought a paper and waited for the train.'
lines.chinese: “7点50分。我买了一份报纸，然后等火车。”
lines.raw: 'At ten to eight. I bought a paper and waited for the train.' | “7点50分。我买了一份报纸，然后等火车。”

lines.chinese: “你没注意到什么不寻常的事情吗？”
lines.raw: 'And you didn't notice anything unusual?' | “你没注意到什么不寻常的事情吗？”

lines.english: 'I suggest,' said the inspector,' that you are not telling the truth.
lines.chinese: “我猜想，”探长说，“你没有说实话。
lines.raw: 'I suggest,' said the inspector,' that you are not telling the truth. | “我猜想，”探长说，“你没有说实话。

lines.english: I suggest that you did not catch the 8 o'clock train,
lines.chinese: 我猜想你并没有赶上8点钟的火车，
lines.raw: I suggest that you did not catch the 8 o'clock train, | 我猜想你并没有赶上8点钟的火车，

lines.english: but that you caught the 8.25 which would still get you to work on time.
lines.chinese: 而是赶了8点25分的火车，那也能让你准时上班。
lines.raw: but that you caught the 8.25 which would still get you to work on time. | 而是赶了8点25分的火车，那也能让你准时上班。

lines.english: You see, on the morning of the murder, the 8 o'clock train did not run at all.
lines.chinese: 你看，在谋杀发生的那天早上，8点钟的火车根本就没有开。
lines.raw: You see, on the morning of the murder, the 8 o'clock train did not run at all. | 你看，在谋杀发生的那天早上，8点钟的火车根本就没有开。

lines.english: It broke down at Ferngreen station and was taken off the line.'
lines.chinese: 它在弗恩格林车站出了故障，被拉下了线路。”
lines.raw: It broke down at Ferngreen station and was taken off the line.' | 它在弗恩格林车站出了故障，被拉下了线路。”
